message:
fix(deps): bump frankensqlite to c0d2c375 for interior overflow fix

Picks up the fix for freeing overflow chains from interior index B-tree
cells during DROP INDEX — prevents orphaned overflow pages for indexes
with large keys.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
